buildCommand: node -v && npm -v && echo '--- root node_modules count ---' && ls node_modules | wc -l && echo '--- react present? ---' && ls -la node_modules/react 2>&1 && echo '--- client node_modules count ---' && ls client/node_modules 2>&1 | wc -l && echo '--- npm ls react ---' && npm ls react --workspace client 2>&1 && npm run build --workspace client
